highlights.text: I wrote Tuesday at 4pm (before CPI): “My general lean is that a relief bounce leg began on Monday by testing megaphone support, and is underway.
I wrote yesterday: “An ultra bull case for tomorrow would see ES get no dip.

post_title: After +200 Points, Is This Weeks SPX Rally Running Out Of Steam? Jan 17th Plan
